response.original_title: (Help) How do I add another booking to my Carnival Cruise?
response.overview: You can add another booking to your Carnival Cruise account through the “Manage My Booking” section +1-866-829-1280 {US} or +44-204-586-5316 {UK} on Carnival’s website. Simply log in, enter the booking number, guest last name, ship, and sailing date to link the reservation to your profile. For help adding guests, linking reservations, or updating cabin details, call +1-866-829-1280 {US} or +44-204-586-5316 {UK}. Some booking changes may require additional fees or availability checks.
response.title: (Help) How do I add another booking to my Carnival Cruise?
